case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. VS. DELICA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2017 BY ELIZABETH ZAREH, JPT> PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BARBARA FREEBERG, BOOKEEPER. DEFENDANT DELICA IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY YASUHIRO IWATA, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DELICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELICA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. DELICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,927.68 FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DELICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELICA $3,428.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,428.93, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A LETTER TO DEFENDANTS FOR HOURS, ITS LABOROR WAITED AROUND TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE LANDLORD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
